article_title: Cognition Raises $1 Billion at $26 Billion Valuation as Devin AI Engineer Hits $492 Million in Annualized Revenue

content_preview.title: Cognition Raises $1 Billion at $26 Billion Valuation as Devin AI Engineer Hits $492 Million in Annualized Revenue
content_preview.summary: The maker of Devin, an autonomous AI software engineer, closed a Series D round led by Lux Capital, General Catalyst, and 8VC, more than doubling its valuation from $10.2 billion eight months earlier.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Cognition, the startup behind Devin, an autonomous AI software engineer, has raised $1 billion in a Series D round at a $25 billion pre-money valuation — implying a $26 billion post-money figure — according to [TechCrunch](https://techcrunch.com/2026/05/27/ai-coding-startup-cognition-raises-1b-at-25b-pre-money-valuation/). The announcement on May 27 marks a valuation that more than doubled from the company's $10.2 billion post-money figure just eight months earlier, when it closed a...

editor_notes.content_quality: Well-structured News article with clear sections. Appropriately distinguishes pre-money ($25B) from post-money ($26B) valuation, which is a common source of confusion. The analysis section provides useful context without editorializing.
editor_notes.source_verification: All 3 sources read from disk snapshots: source-0.html.gz (TechCrunch — confirms $25B pre/$26B post valuation, co-leads Lux/General Catalyst/8VC, new investors Ribbit/Atreides/Layer, Mercedes-Benz/NASA/Goldman Sachs/Santander customers, 50% MoM enterprise growth, $492M ARR), source-1.html.gz (The Next Web — confirms $37M→$492M revenue, Scott Wu 90% internal code claim, $2.5B total raised, Windsurf acquisition), source-2.html.gz (Winbuzzer — confirms Nubank customer, tenfold enterprise growth since start of 2026, December 2024 general availability, Claude Code competition context). All claims trace accurately to cited sources.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All specifics verified. Note: existing article from 2026-04/26 covered funding talks at $25B valuation — this submission covers the completed close (May 27 announcement) with confirmed $26B post-money, specific investor details, and $492M ARR figure. This is a genuine follow-up with new confirmed data, not a duplicate.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional throughout. Analysis section appropriately contextualizes without bias.
editor_notes.originality: Not a duplicate. The April 26 article covered funding talks still in progress; this article covers the completed round with confirmed financials, investor list, and revenue milestone.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Clean, well-sourced funding announcement with verified specifics. All automated checks passed. Recommend adding a related_articles link to the April 26 Cognition article as a genuine editorial connection.
